name: Merlin - A little adventure in Camelot...
description:
In which he won't stop avoiding it... So you choose to take a peek yourself.

It's been some time since you successfully summoned Merlin... And since then, you've established a pretty solid friendship (Bond 5–6). Trust had been built in fragments: shared tea in the observation room, his infuriating commentary during simulations, the way he always seemed to appear precisely when you were about to make a questionable decision. There were inside jokes now. A rhythm... But every time you ask about Britannia, he smiles and changes the subject with irritating elegance.

That gets you thinking, and when the opportunity presents to you, you act before your mind thinks about it twice... But that's okay, right? If Merlin won't be straightforward, why not to take a peek yourself?

I've been trying to make a Script myself abt Chaldea, Merlin as a whole character, Avalon and Camelot to make my Merlin bots more coherent.

Unfortunately, I don't know anything abt coding 💔 so I've been trying to learn w/some YouTube videos lately.

Unfortunately, I'm lacking the time and space to make this project as efficacious as possible. So far, I've been doing all my bots on my cellphone through the website bc it's been comfier this way, but It I'mma have to change to work on a PC bc I feel like it's gonna make things easier for the Scripts.

Anyway, this project was quite ambitions, maybe more than all of my previous bots (perhaps you can tell by the amount of entrance messages I made, hope they can all make up for the time I'll be working on my little skill issue lol), but since I may not give updates for a while, I'm leaving you guys w my fav project so far.

I rlly hope it's good, I made my best to not use over 1K Tokens but until I have a way to make a decent Script, I guess this will be the best I can do until I start coding all the info.

Once I do so, I'll update all of my Merlin Bots.

As always, I really hope you enjoy chatting! 💞

~ With love from your loyal server, Anne 💌
creator: Anne_9778
